segments: ذُكِرَتْ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْأَدْهَانُ فَذُكِرَ الْبَنَفْسَجُ وَ فَضْلُهُ فَقَالَ نِعْمَ الدُّهْنُ الْبَنَفْسَجُ ادَّهِنُوا بِهِ فَإِنَّ فَضْلَهُ عَلَى الْأَدْهَانِ كَفَضْلِنَا عَلَى النَّاسِ وَ الْبَانُ دُهْنُ ذَكَرٍ نِعْمَ الدُّهْنُ الْبَانُ وَ إِنَّهُ لَيُعْجِبُنِي الْخَلُوقُ .
arabic.text: ذُكِرَتْ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْأَدْهَانُ فَذُكِرَ الْبَنَفْسَجُ وَ فَضْلُهُ فَقَالَ نِعْمَ الدُّهْنُ الْبَنَفْسَجُ ادَّهِنُوا بِهِ فَإِنَّ فَضْلَهُ عَلَى الْأَدْهَانِ كَفَضْلِنَا عَلَى النَّاسِ وَ الْبَانُ دُهْنُ ذَكَرٍ نِعْمَ الدُّهْنُ الْبَانُ وَ إِنَّهُ لَيُعْجِبُنِي الْخَلُوقُ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Muhammad Bin Al Fayz who said,

‘The (massaging) oils were mentioned in the presence of Abu Abdullahasws, so the violet (oil) was mentioned, and its merits, so heasws said: ‘The best of the (massaging) oils is the violet, oil (massage) with it, for its merit over the (rest of the) oils is like ourasws merits over the (rest of the) people’. And heasws mentioned the frankincense oil: ‘The best of the oils is the frankincense, and it is Al-Khalouq which appeals to measws’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Muhammad Bin Al Fayz who said, ‘The (massaging) oils were mentioned in the presence of Abu Abdullahasws, so the violet (oil) was mentioned, and its merits, so heasws said: ‘The best of the (massaging) oils is the violet, oil (massage) with it, for its merit over the (rest of the) oils is like ourasws merits over the (rest of the) people’. And heasws mentioned the frankincense oil: ‘The best of the oils is the frankincense, and it is Al-Khalouq which appeals to measws’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Muhammad ibn al-Fayd who has said the following: “I once mentioned oils and viola oil and its excellence before abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam. He (the Imam) said, ‘Viola oil is very good oil. You must apply it; its excellence over other oils is like our excellence over other people. Oil of frankincense is fine oil, I however like al-Khuluq oil.”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Muhammad ibn al-Fayd who has said the following: “I once mentioned oils and viola oil and its excellence before abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam. He (the Imam) said, ‘Viola oil is very good oil. You must apply it; its excellence over other oils is like our excellence over other people. Oil of frankincense is fine oil, I however like al-Khuluq oil.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/432)
gradings.label: مجهول
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/432)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحَكَمِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفَيْضِ قَالَ

segments: شَكَا رَجُلٌ إِلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) شُقَاقاً فِي يَدَيْهِ وَ رِجْلَيْهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ خُذْ قُطْنَةً فَاجْعَلْ فِيهَا بَاناً وَ ضَعْهَا فِي سُرَّتِكَ فَقَالَ إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ يَجْعَلُ الْبَانَ فِي قُطْنَةٍ وَ يَجْعَلُهَا فِي سُرَّتِهِ فَقَالَ أَمَّا أَنْتَ يَا إِسْحَاقُ فَصُبَّ الْبَانَ فِي سُرَّتِكَ فَإِنَّهَا كَبِيرَةٌ قَالَ ابْنُ أُذَيْنَةَ لَقِيتُ الرَّجُلَ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ فَأَخْبَرَنِي أَنَّهُ فَعَلَهُ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً فَذَهَبَ عَنْهُ .
arabic.text: شَكَا رَجُلٌ إِلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) شُقَاقاً فِي يَدَيْهِ وَ رِجْلَيْهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ خُذْ قُطْنَةً فَاجْعَلْ فِيهَا بَاناً وَ ضَعْهَا فِي سُرَّتِكَ فَقَالَ إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ يَجْعَلُ الْبَانَ فِي قُطْنَةٍ وَ يَجْعَلُهَا فِي سُرَّتِهِ فَقَالَ أَمَّا أَنْتَ يَا إِسْحَاقُ فَصُبَّ الْبَانَ فِي سُرَّتِكَ فَإِنَّهَا كَبِيرَةٌ قَالَ ابْنُ أُذَيْنَةَ لَقِيتُ الرَّجُلَ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ فَأَخْبَرَنِي أَنَّهُ فَعَلَهُ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً فَذَهَبَ عَنْهُ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, and Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Azina who said,

‘A man complained to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> of cracks in his hands and his legs, so he<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘Take cotton and put some frankincense oil in it and place it in your navel’. So Is’haq Bin Ammar said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Put the frankincense oil in the cotton and make it to be in his navel?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘As for you, O Is’haq, so pour the frankincense in your navel, for it is bigger (task)’. Ibn Azina (the narrator) said, ‘I met the man after that, so he informed me that he had done it once, so it went away from him’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from Is’haq Bin Ammar, and Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Azina who said,

‘A man complained to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> of cracks in his hands and his legs, so he<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘Take cotton and put some frankincense oil in it and place it in your navel’. So Is’haq Bin Ammar said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! Put the frankincense oil in the cotton and make it to be in his navel?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘As for you, O Is’haq, so pour the frankincense in your navel, for it is bigger (task)’. Ibn Azina (the narrator) said, ‘I met the man after that, so he informed me that he had done it once, so it went away from him’.

segments: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Muhammad ibn abu Hamzah from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar and ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Udhaynah who has said the following: “Once, a man complained before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about cracks in his hands and feet. He (the Imam) said, ‘Take a piece of cotton, place frankincense oil in it and apply it in your belly button.’ Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar has said that I said, ‘I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause, frankincense oil in cotton, then in his belly button?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘O Ishaq, to pour frankincense oil in your belly button it is a great task.’ Ibn ‘Udhaynah has said, ‘Thereafter I met the man. He informed me that he followed the instruction only once and his problems went away.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Muhammad ibn abu Hamzah from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar and ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ‘Udhaynah who has said the following: “Once, a man complained before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about cracks in his hands and feet. He (the Imam) said, ‘Take a piece of cotton, place frankincense oil in it and apply it in your belly button.’ Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar has said that I said, ‘I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause, frankincense oil in cotton, then in his belly button?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘O Ishaq, to pour frankincense oil in your belly button it is a great task.’ Ibn ‘Udhaynah has said, ‘Thereafter I met the man. He informed me that he followed the instruction only once and his problems went away.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/433)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/433)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ وَ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ أُذَيْنَةَ قَالَ

segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) نِعْمَ الدُّهْنُ الْبَانُ .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) نِعْمَ الدُّهْنُ الْبَانُ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Dawood Bin Is’haq Abu Suleyman Al Haza’a, from Muhammad Bin Al Fayz who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The best of the (massaging) oils is the frankincense (oil)’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Dawood Bin Is’haq Abu Suleyman Al Haza’a, from Muhammad Bin Al Fayz who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The best of the (massaging) oils is the frankincense (oil)’.

segments: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Dawud ibn Ishaq abu Sulayman al-Hadhdha’ from Muhammad ibn al-Fayd who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Frankincense oil is a fine oil.’”
en.sarwar.text: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Dawud ibn Ishaq abu Sulayman al-Hadhdha’ from Muhammad ibn al-Fayd who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Frankincense oil is a fine oil.’”

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ دَاوُدَ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ أَبِي سُلَيْمَانَ الْحَذَّاءِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفَيْضِ قَالَ

parts.text: دَاوُدَ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ أَبِي سُلَيْمَانَ الْحَذَّاءِ
